whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served the Metuchen community for years with licensed, insured technicians who use proven removal methods and eco-friendly treatments. We offer transparent pricing of $350 - $550, same-day emergency service, and a satisfaction guarantee on all hornet removal jobs.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Metuchen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service in Metuchen ranges from $350 to $550, depending on nest size, location, and accessibility. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees after a brief assessment of your property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Metuchen?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Metuchen. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can typically arrive at your property within a few hours of your call.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use professional-grade products and techniques that are safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We take all necessary precautions to protect occupants and will advise you of any temporary safety measures needed during treatment.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger, typically build aerial paper nests in trees or under eaves, and are generally more aggressive than wasps. Yellow jackets are a type of wasp that often nest in ground cavities or wall voids. Our technicians can identify the species and use the most effective removal method for your specific situation.
